metadata.description: Local marketplace for the intelli-claw Claude Code Channel plugin. Register via `claude plugin marketplace add <path-to-repo>`.

plugins.name: intelli-claw-channel
plugins.description: Localhost + LAN webchat channel for Claude Code — bridges the intelli-claw UI (Vite + React 19) to Claude Code sessions with file upload, edits, and optional pairing for mobile access.
